Giants Reminder String  
 


Slot: WAIST
AC: 2
INT: +5
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except HUM ERU HEF DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Giants Reminder String

Slot: WAIST
AC: 2
INT: +5
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except HUM ERU HEF DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:A Giants Reminder String
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 2 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:98
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:56:14
Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

North Karana
NPC Name
Timbur the tiny


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
North Karana

Now drops again...
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2005 at 11:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1707092188104
View User Forum
36 posts
I didn't think this dropped anymore but saw him up and killed him today. He dropped the string.
▲ Page top
Think i could take?
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2002 at 1:33 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252858017
27 posts
Do you guys think a lvl 32 Ranger, who can do about 60 dmg avrage per hit with his 2hs sword can take him?
▲ Page top
RE: Think i could take?
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2003 at 6:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758106980
222 posts
No - a 32 ranger can not handle a 22 giant - you should count yourself fortunate that you can escape from a fight with an orc pawn, much less something 10 levels lower than you.

@#$% ebay
▲ Page top
Still drops
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 12:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769597078
2 posts
I found Timbur the Tiny on track in NK last night somewhere between the druid ring and the bridge to EK. Looked like a regular HG but dropped really easy to my 52 ranger. Dropped the belt and 7 silver. I have hunted a lot in NK with my ranger at various levels and had never seen Timbur before.
▲ Page top
Got Him
QuoteReply
# May 26 2002 at 9:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777250173
View User Forum
7 posts
My 45 druid was curious last week, had him on track, killed him for the heck of it. Got the belt...YEA, gave to my enchanter friend....missed out on 2kpp...oh well
▲ Page top
Seen in EK
QuoteReply
# May 15 2002 at 4:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249498503
56 posts
Tis true, I have seen him in Eastern Karana's near 1500, -1000. I was there last month killing the Dark Elf Corruptor for my epic and we saw him walking along. One of the groups killed him and reported MT. Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
RE: Seen in EK
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2002 at 3:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253192793
10 posts
Sounds like you saw Tarbul Earthstrider, one of the mage epic mobs.

QuoteReply
# May 04 2002 at 5:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763355070
3 posts
Look like this does not drop anymore but drop instead "a giant reminder string" and is only usable by
Bar Elf Hie Def Dwf Trl Ogr Hfl Gnm Iks Vah

Too bad for my erudite wizard
▲ Page top
DAMNN
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2002 at 3:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773440424
2 posts
MAN I HAD THIS STRING AND I SOLD FOR 600PP TODAY LETS JUST SAY I GOT RIPPPPED!!!!
▲ Page top
RE: DAMNN
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 7:09 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Not really. This item is for lowbies. 2AC and 5INT aren't that great for casters anymore. 600 sounds way high to me. I value things according to how useful they are, not how rare they are or what mob they drop off of. This would likely be only a 10PP item in bazaar today. If it were an earring or ring it would likely be worth more, but not as an armor piece.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: DAMNN
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2003 at 10:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764159522
72 posts
10pp??? OMG. You must be very uber, or very crazy to sell something like this for 10p. I, as a wizard, dont get hit unless its a VERY bad situation. And so, AC, HPs, STA, AGI... well all of those dont matter much to me. 5 int is pretty nice up until your 40s or so. So...think about it. This is very similiar to a braided cinch cord which sells for about 200p on my server. So, I have to say while 600p is too much, 10p is ridiculous. so Shush!

Ayngree Kor`Atask
Channeler
▲ Page top

17 posts

He is still around all. I was personally chased in Eastern Karanas by this infamous giant just a few days ago. I am a wizard lvl 35 and could nt get the job done alone but good luck to you all. :)

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 29 2001 at 9:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i have killed this guy about 100 times in my EQ career. he never drops anything at all
String is still dropped
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2001 at 10:18 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got this off of him yesterday (02/15/2001). He was chasing a lvl 38 druid and for some reason peeled off to attack me while medding. I was very pleased because I had never seen him spawn before and figured I wouldnt again because someone already had him. I guess the other druid was out of mana when he ran across him because he let me have him without comment..lucky. He was not very difficult at 35...but I wouldnt underestimate any mobs lately..even at green.

Kyote
Tholuxe Paells
Druid of Tunare
